top_signals.title: NATO summit host Turkey sees its alliance clout rising amid war raging nearby
top_signals.summary: Government leaders hope to show off the country's burgeoning defense industry at the alliance event.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Public Spending in Mexico Ends Prolonged Fall in Fixed Investment
top_signals.summary: A key measure of investments in Mexico snapped back in April driven largely by government spending while private investment lagged, offering scant relief to President Claudia Sheinbaum’s push for stronger economic growth.
